ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the passenger survived (1) or not (0) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard with the passenger */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard with the passenger */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number of the passenger */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "home_port" TEXT /* Home port of the passenger */,
  "traveling_with" TEXT /* Passenger(s) traveling with (e.g., alone, family, friends) */,
  "disembarkation_status" TEXT /* Disembarkation status (e.g., completed, interrupted, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "departure_port" TEXT /* Port from which the ship departs */,
  "arrival_port" TEXT /* Port at which the ship arrives */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route taken by the ship (e.g., transatlantic, Mediterranean) */,
  "voyage_type" TEXT /* Type of voyage (e.g., passenger, cargo, repositioning) */,
  "ship_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the ship */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the voyage (e.g., calm, rough, stormy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage during which the incident occurred */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger involved in the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of the incident (e.g., medical, safety, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time taken to respond to the incident */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident resolution (e.g., resolved, pending, unresolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage for which the ticket was sold */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Unique ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare associated with the ticket */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was sold */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the ticket was sold (e.g., online, agent, onboard) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to pay for the ticket (e.g., cash, credit, debit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for demographic record */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage associated with the demographic record */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers on the voyage */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of passengers */,
  "male_count" INTEGER /* Total number of male passengers */,
  "female_count" INTEGER /* Total number of female passengers */,
  "first_class_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers in first class */,
  "second_class_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers in second class */,
  "third_class_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers in third class */,
  "nationality_breakdown" TEXT /* Breakdown of passengers by nationality (e.g., British: 500, American: 200) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_demographics_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage on which the crew member served */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., captain, nurse, engineer) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the crew member */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the crew member */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Relevant certifications held by the crew member (e.g., STCW, radar operator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_members_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety measure */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage on which the measure was implemented */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the safety measure */,
  "date_implemented" TEXT /* Date the measure was implemented */,
  "measure_type" TEXT /* Type of safety measure (e.g., procedural, equipment-based, training) */,
  "measure_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the safety measure (e.g., ship-wide, departmental, individual) */,
  "measure_status" TEXT /* Status of the safety measure (e.g., active, inactive, pending review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_measures_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, staff) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, pending approval) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, data retrieval) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system (e.g., office, remote) */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, laptop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ship_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship on which maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance activity occurred */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, repair, upgrade) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., completed, pending, scheduled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ship_maintenance_ship_name FOREIGN KEY ("ship_name") REFERENCES voyages ("ship_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "port_info" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "port_location" TEXT /* Location of the port (e.g., city, state, country) */,
  "port_facilities" TEXT /* Facilities available at the port (e.g., fueling, provisioning, repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_port_info_port_name FOREIGN KEY ("port_name") REFERENCES voyages ("arrival_port"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_port_info_port_name FOREIGN KEY ("port_name") REFERENCES voyages ("departure_port")
)
